creator: koue@chaosophia.net
text:
Comment on attachment 196659
Update; this patch applies cleaner for me

Fails on FreeBSD 10.4 i386

fatal error: error in backend: ran out of registers during register allocation
cc: error: clang frontend command failed with exit code 70 (use -v to see invocation)
FreeBSD clang version 3.4.1 (tags/RELEASE_34/dot1-final 208032) 20140512
Target: i386-unknown-freebsd10.4
